name: Fruit Filling for Japanese Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush and drain the pineapple.
2. Combine all ingredients in the top half of a double boiler over simmering water, ensuring they do not come into contact with the water itself.
3. Cook, stirring frequently, until the mixture thickens to a quite thick consistency.
4. Remove from heat and allow to cool, stirring occasionally.
